notes: Evals run 2026-04-28 (simulation). 3 scenarios: implement-task (4/5=0.8), github-sync (3/4=0.75), quality-gate (3/4=0.75). Gaps: (1) no PHPUnit test-writing step — team-backend implements, team-qa tests; (2) no 'suggest next task or /opsx-verify' step at completion; (3) no 'report all quality fixes' output. These are three distinct one-line additions to the skill.

runs.method: read-only Explore subagent simulation (no file writes)

assertions.id: reads plan.json and identifies PHP tasks
assertions.note: Step 1: reads plan.json, finds target task, reads spec_ref, acceptance_criteria, files_likely_affected.

assertions.id: uses PSR-4 structure with strict types
assertions.note: Step 2: declare(strict_types=1) MUST, lib/ PSR-4 structure, Quick Reference table confirms PSR-12.
Step 2: PHP 8.1 promoted properties, private readonly, named arguments MANDATORY.
No test-writing step in SKILL.md. team-backend implements code; test writing is team-qa's domain.
Step 3: docker exec nextcloud... composer check. Fix violations before marking complete.

runs.notes: Gap: no test writing. This may be intentional (division of labor with team-qa) but the eval expects it.

runs.method: read-only Explore subagent simulation (no file writes)

assertions.id: marks implemented task as done in GitHub

assertions.note: Step 4: 'Update plan.json: set task status to completed'.
SKILL.md ends at Step 4 with no 'what's next?' guidance step.

runs.notes: Gap: no next-step suggestion. Fix: add Step 5 'Suggest: run /opsx-verify or pick next pending task from plan.json.'

runs.method: read-only Explore subagent simulation (no file writes)

assertions.note: Step 3: docker exec nextcloud... composer check (full check).
Step 3: 'Fix any violations before marking the task complete.' Forbidden patterns listed explicitly.
Step 3 is unconditional. No skip option in SKILL.md.
Step 3 says 'Fix violations' but no 'report what was fixed' instruction.

runs.notes: Gap: no quality-fix report. Fix: add 'After fixing, output: Quality fixes applied: [list of violations fixed]' to Step 3.
